statement.headerDoc:
STEP Batch 3 — 14 additional NT unsolved problems: finite verifications
  ========================================================================

  Concise bundled Lean 4 file: one short section per problem with 1-3
  concrete numeric claims proved by native_decide.

  1.  Goldbach       — n=4..100 represented as sum of 2 primes
  2.  GRH            — no direct verification (listed for registry)
  3.  Polignac       — gap 2 catalog (twin primes subset)
  4.  Markov         — first Markov numbers
  5.  Montgomery     — random matrix GUE correlation (numerical)
  6.  Carmichael     — φ⁻¹(k) co

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
